caption:
Cosy bakery and cafe to visit near Trafalgar Square ✨ @bombolone.london

With freshly made Italian-style doughnuts every day 🤍Highlights include pistachio amore, tiramisu, salted caramel and crème brulée!🍩

With a fantastic Valentine’s collection coming soon 💝�
Perfect spot for a sweet break while exploring the city or a box of treats for later🎁 Enjoy specialty coffee and signature drinks(including milkshakes, hot chocolates, seasonal lattes and more) ☕️

📍 Bombolone Doughnut & Bakery Café 21 Whitcomb Street, London WC2H 7HA
